name: controlOps Dashboard API
detail: FastAPI dashboard UI and JSON API are responding from the control VM.

name: controlOps Ansible Controller
detail: Approved playbooks and inventories are staged on controlOps for lab orchestration.

name: victimMachine Splunk Enterprise
detail: Blue-team dashboard and ingest surface from the DEMO-FULL default compose stack.

name: victimMachine Splunk Payload Server
detail: Serves Universal Forwarder payloads and deployment helpers for Linux targets.

name: victimMachine Logistics Portal
detail: Public upload surface for the MIL-STD-1553 vulnerable scenario.

name: victimMachine Maintenance Terminal
detail: Bridge workload between the public logistics network and the internal avionics segment.

name: victimMachine Serial Bus
detail: Internal avionics service on the isolated bus segment used by the 1553 training chain.

name: victimMachine Log4j Auth Service
detail: Java Log4j 2.14.1 login surface included in DEMO-FULL for vulnerability analysis.

name: victimMachine Log4j Inventory Service
detail: Java Log4j 2.14.1 search surface included in DEMO-FULL for vulnerability analysis.

name: victimMachine Log4j Status Service
detail: Python status service used as the negative control in the Log4j exercise.

name: victimMachine SBOM-XRay Lab
detail: SBOM analysis container retained in DEMO-FULL as end-state training material.
